NeuralShift AI

LOCATION

San Francisco, CA

TYPE

Internship

COMPENSATION

$18-22/hour

TECH STACK

PyTorch

TensorFlow

MLflow

AWS SageMaker

Google Vertex AI

Feature Store

Python

Docker

Kubernetes

SQL

Intern Machine Learning Engineer

About NeuralShift AI: NeuralShift AI is an innovative machine
learning platform company based in San Francisco that helps
enterprises build, deploy, and monitor ML models at scale. We
specialize in end-to-end ML infrastructure, enabling data
teams to move from experimentation to production faster than

ever before. Our mission is to make advanced ML accessible
to organizations of all sizes.

Join NeuralShift AI as a Machine Learning Engineer Intern and
gain hands-on experience building ML models and pipelines in
a fast-paced environment. You'll work alongside senior ML

engineers on real production challenges, learning industry best
practices while contributing to features that serve thousands of
enterprise customers. This is an ideal role for students or
recent graduates looking to launch their ML engineering career
with mentorship from experienced practitioners.

RESPONSIBILITIES

Develop and train machine learning models using PyTorch
and TensorFlow under senior engineer guidance

Assist in preparing datasets, performing feature
engineering, and validating data quality for ML pipelines

Collaborate on model experimentation, tracking experiments

with MLflow and documenting findings in technical reports

Help deploy models to AWS SageMaker or Google Vertex
AI following established best practices

Participate in code reviews, learning ML engineering
standards and contributing to internal documentation

Debug and improve existing ML models by analyzing
performance metrics and running ablation studies

Support feature store management and explore best
practices for feature versioning and sharing across teams

REQUIREMENTS

Currently pursuing or recently completed a Bachelor's
degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, Physics, or
related field

Strong foundation in Python programming with experience
in data manipulation libraries (NumPy, Pandas)

Understanding of machine learning fundamentals:
supervised/unsupervised learning, model evaluation, and
overfitting

Democratizing machine learning forenterprise decision-making Familiarity with at least one ML framework (PyTorch or
TensorFlow)

Solid grasp of linear algebra, statistics, and calculus

fundamentals

BONUS POINTS

Experience with MLflow or other experiment tracking tools

Exposure to cloud platforms (AWS or Google Cloud) and
model deployment concepts

Coursework or projects in deep learning, NLP, or computer
vision

Prior internship or research experience in machine learning
or related fields

BENEFITS

Competitive hourly rate with potential for conversion to full-

time upon graduation

Mentorship from experienced ML engineers and access to
regular learning sessions

Professional development budget for courses, conferences,
or certifications

Flexible working arrangements and remote work options

Free access to ML learning platforms and technical
resources

Casual work environment with team lunches and social
events

APPLY

Submit your resume, cover letter, and a link to your GitHub
profile or portfolio demonstrating ML projects to
careers@neuralshift.ai. Please include a brief description of
your most interesting ML project to date. Applications are
reviewed on a rolling basis.
